hotel_name: DoubleTree by Hilton Fairfield Hotel & Suites

reviews.text: I really like this hotel but there was a certain convention this past weekend and they kind of overtook the whole hotel. And it was kind of an inconvenience to the rest of us.So the next time I come here.I'm going to call first because because I will not stay here when they have one of these quote unquote conventions...

reviews.title: Horrible don’t book. The points given in return didn’t match my stay waste of money
reviews.negatives: I was told pool was open prior to checking in both on the phone and in person. When i checked in and came downstairs the pool all of a sudden became closed. Urine leaking from ceiling. Horrible

reviews.title: 很棒的飯店
reviews.text: 入住KING SIZE的房間,乾淨也很舒適,早餐也滿多選擇的.如有開車是很方便,

reviews.title: Horrible for the price I had to pay, to not get rest after my family wedding
reviews.positives: The lobby
reviews.negatives: My room was dirty the floor and the bathroom was the worst the bathtub had big dirty dirt inside we could not used the shower and tub, and they could not change our room and we had to sleep sitting up on the chair, it the worst hotel I have ever been, the other hotels in different states be much clean , suites do not look horrible like that at all

reviews.title: Won’t go back
reviews.positives: Clean and friendly staff
reviews.negatives: Everything was fine until the last day. It turned out to be Halloween in April. A Furry Convention took over the hotel.

reviews.title: Not selecting this chain of hotels again.
reviews.positives: The room was un clean and very run down, definitely the worst double tree hotel I have ever stayed in my entire life. Very disappointing!!!!

reviews.title: There are plenty of hotels in the area- stay at one of them
reviews.positives: The location and the front desk staff
reviews.negatives: The indoor pool was freezing cold and we couldn’t use it which was very upsetting as we picked this hotel for the pool. I could hear a dog barking in the room next door late into the night as the room walls were thin enough  to allow us to hear entire conversations in the rooms next to us.

reviews.title: Will never stay in a Holiday Inn again and never book from Booking.com
reviews.positives: Nothing special
reviews.negatives: They did not honour the price that Booking.com gave me.

reviews.title: Would like a refund.
reviews.positives: The location
reviews.negatives: Everything else. Staff was rude, we were never offered cookies, uncomfortable room,

reviews.title: The money spent didn't match the expected experience
reviews.positives: Quiet room and very clean.
reviews.negatives: Didn't have breakfast. They charge $18. Two other hotels in same area charge $5 more per night but offer hot breakfast at no charge. Towel rack was bent and wouldnt hold towels well. Refrigerator wouldnt work due to bad outlet. Found this out when coffee maker wouldn't work. A light out in bathroom and toilet wouldnt flush right.

reviews.title: Bearable at best, nothing to write home about.
reviews.positives: The beds are good and comfortable.
reviews.negatives: When we got there I was repeatedly told they did not have my reservation. I showed the woman my confirmation but she insisted. She didn’t know what she was doing and we spent an hour in the lobby upset. Someone had to help her. The place is also getting shabby. There was no window in the room. A black barrier ran across it. Bathroom shower did not look clean.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Staff had an attitude, especially the front desk the horrible customer service no courtesy
reviews.negatives: Hire more friendly staff and accommodations

reviews.title: Nice friendly people, clean facilities really nice and close to the mall
reviews.positives: The locationis great and the place had friendly folks ws clean.
reviews.negatives:
Well, the coffee maker in the room did not work.
So I went downstairs to the general coffee station

I took a shower early but when I went to brush teeth etc before leaving
Water spurted and stopped then brown water poured from the tap
and the water stopped entirely NO flush, no sink nothing

Lastly I would have used the pool had I seen the sign earlier
it was in a out of the way place   would have loved a swim

I stayed here a week before and non of these problems were there…..

reviews.title: Average stay for business wouldn’t stay for personal vacation
reviews.positives: Location to training class
reviews.negatives: Water leaking from multiple locations within the lobby and restaurant. Wait staff not so courageous.

reviews.title: I’m not sure if I would return back to this hotel
reviews.positives: The breakfast
reviews.negatives: My hotel bathroom had hair everywhere. I had to clean it myself before getting in the shower as I already was undressed after checking in we also found some hair on our pillow.

reviews.title: Not impressed. Not sure I’ll stay there again.
reviews.positives:
Never saw a breakfast. Was in a good location.
We did have dinner in nectar and enjoyed the salad. The waiter was excellent. I would eat there again. The room was clean.
reviews.negatives: The beds were hard. The fridge the inside of the door came loose and was not very cold.  The vent in the bathroom did not work. End of November and the AC was still on. Room was cold. Chair was missing a cushion so it was also hard.

reviews.title: Enjoyable relaxing quite
reviews.positives: Property was updated and very clean
reviews.negatives: We didn’t like how cold the pool room was now towels and you had to walk through a air conditioning fitness room to get back out.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: The property was awesome. They told me to contact booking.com to get a day back because I was I left a day earlier so I'm waiting on that so now I see your hands give me a credit for Friday night cause then that stay Friday night or else I'll stop using booking. They tell all my people at Tyson foods corporate office where I workthey don't back their customers. I expect a reply and a credit on my credit card within by Thursday or Friday of this week.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Breakfast was good. Coffee too strong. Its supposed to be black. It was brownish.
reviews.negatives: Coffee.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.negatives: The property seemed a little tired.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.positives: How clean it was
reviews.negatives: Too expensive for what it is and staff was a little unorganized and gave me an issue with the reservation at first but it was resolved

reviews.title: Overall good stay & I would return to this location in the future.
reviews.negatives: I thought it ridiculous that the restaurant was not open for dinner on the weekend.  I looked forward to having my meal &/or taking it up to my room to relax.  Very disappointing to find I had to leave the hotel; go back out after arriving, in the rain to get dinner.

reviews.title: Great heated pool and very close to Chick-fil-A
reviews.positives: The heated pool was amazing
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Great facility
reviews.positives: Neatly organized perfect customer service
reviews.negatives: Nothing about the property just the unfortunate loud individuals next-door

reviews.title: Overall, a good stay in a very clean room with friendly staff.
reviews.positives: The staff were great. Rooms were clean. Nice atmosphere. I would stay again.
reviews.negatives:
We did have a nuisance fire alarm that could have been handled a little less chaotically.  It seemed no-one really knew what to do.  Also, there should have been some PA announcement to exit the building, or not to exit the building, where to congregate, and when it was okay to return to our rooms.
There was a lot of snow on the ground yet only one shoveled area to get from parking lot to sidewalk that was not immediately visible, nor in a convenient place. It couldn't be seen in the dark when I arrived. I found a spot where people were making tiny foot paths through snow and ice to get through.  Sidewalk had debris and ice on it in spots making walking hazardous.

reviews.title: Grest experience…beds and food excellent!
reviews.positives: Beds were sooo comfortable

reviews.title: Beds were very comfortable .
reviews.positives: This hotel is very clean, spacious room, good price, and the receptionists were very friendly.
reviews.negatives: Parking is a little bit far from the entrance.

reviews.title: Pretty good hotel, if you have the money.
reviews.positives: The workers there were very Nice.
reviews.negatives: Over priced, it was a bit expensive and it was without a meal.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: The front amazing they welcoming us as part of the family
reviews.negatives: I have tried to back again to the hotel after I have check out I found strong storm and I cant drive back to Massachusetts place I live I have tried to call no body pick the phone ...

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Location, cleanliness, room size
reviews.negatives: That you had to request a microwave. Was not included in the room

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Hotel concierge was very polite and helpful for this first time visit.  Very accommodating to me.

reviews.title: Exceptional hotel that exceeded my expectations!
reviews.positives: It was so fresh, clean and comfort. The hotel looks just like the photos! The staff was lovely!

reviews.title: Very nice hotel and staff.
reviews.positives: The staff was nice and helpful
reviews.negatives: The other guests running through hallways and talking loud in hallways all through the evening and night.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: We arrive around 10:30pm the front desk staff was warm welcoming.
reviews.negatives: The smell and cleanliness as soon as we walked in.   Oh and the warm cookies!

reviews.title: My stay was very comfortable.
reviews.positives: I stayed in this hotel for my cousin’s wedding that was in a nearby venue. It was very beautiful and clean. Initially, I was assigned the incorrect room but it was corrected quickly before I could unpack. The breakfast buffet was supreme. Although, I only ate the oatmeal, muffin and coffee, I was very satisfied. The entire breakfast items available looked fresh. The breakfast staff was very helpful in getting me ice for my coffee as I wanted to create my own ice coffee. The employee had a nice conversation with me. I loved the sitting area that had the fireplace also. I commend the manager of this hotel who has a very satisfactory operation.
reviews.negatives: I didn’t have any dislikes since I only stayed one night.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Everything about the property was great
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Excellent stay ☺️
reviews.positives: Service was good , Nabil give us a good service thanks to him
reviews.negatives: The pool was closed unfortunately

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Very clean and nice location
reviews.negatives: To much noise late at night and early morning

reviews.title: It was comfortable to stay and close to mall etcc
reviews.positives: Location was good
reviews.negatives: Pool was close

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Clean , staff members perfect 
Easy to check in and out

reviews.title: Comfortable & Convenient
reviews.positives: I love the lobby area with multiple drink options. The cookies are a sweet little addition at check-in. The restaurant has great options with good service. The bathroom accommodations are really nice and smell great.
reviews.negatives: It rained while we were seated at the restaurant and it started leaking over our table. We made the restaurant staff aware and just switched tables.

reviews.title: We loved it..we have stayed there twice before, a GREAT location close to relatives and the Mall is
reviews.positives:
Really great..our server was so lovely.
Lots of food options.
reviews.negatives: No wifi where we ate in the Restuarant

reviews.title: Will stay here again
reviews.positives: Room was comfortable and quiet. Able to check in online.
reviews.negatives: Breakfast is very expensive.

reviews.title: I would’ve liked to have had a bathtub
reviews.positives: Cleanliness
reviews.negatives: Nothing I didn’t like

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Nice clean

reviews.title: Front desk was friendly and very accommodating
reviews.positives: Very clean. Safe location. Close to Target and a lot of different shops.
reviews.negatives: Initially they didn’t have our double bed room available but they automatically upgraded us to a junior suite. The junior suite was fine but the AC was not working so they upgraded us to the Presidential suite so ultimately it worked out.
